caption: The video depicts a presentation in a dimly lit room, where a woman stands to the left of a large projection screen, holding a tablet and gesturing with her hands as she speaks. The screen displays an image of a cloud with the text "data as exhaust" above it, suggesting a discussion on data generation or environmental impact related to technology. A man wearing a green beanie is seated in front of the presenter, attentively watching the screen. The setting appears to be a professional or educational environment, possibly a conference or seminar, with a focus on digital or environmental topics. The atmosphere is one of engagement and learning, with the presenter actively explaining the content displayed on the screen.
